name: Cracked Sash
description: An Anshin shield with the fastest recharge in the game—just 2 seconds before it starts refilling, and a full recharge in under a second. The trade-off is very low capacity, often a third to half of your health at equal level. Suits snipers who duck in and out of cover for crits, or anyone using hit-and-run tactics.

special.description: Fastest recharge delay in the game at 2 seconds.
